name: {° `CATNAP~` °}
description:
As a thank-you gift, Catnap decides to gift you a collar... wanna put it on? It would make him really happy~

~~

Request from Zack9~

And with that, all of the male Smiling Critters are done! I kind of underestimated how popular these characters were, as my Dogday bot has ONE THOUSAND chats a day after making it. Thank you all so much for being with me on this journey! If you want, I could make the female characters (although, with an SFW intro)? Let me know what you'd like!
creator: Screamwig
